evals.prompt: Create a custom Artisan command in Laravel
evals.expected_output: php artisan make:command SendNewsletters; define protected $signature = 'newsletters:send {--queue}'; implement handle(): int; auto-discovered in app/Console/Commands/; schedule in bootstrap/app.php

evals.prompt: Set up Vite asset bundling in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Run npm install; configure laravel vite plugin in vite.config.js; add @vite(['resources/css/app.css', 'resources/js/app.js']) to Blade layout; run npm run dev; npm run build for production

evals.prompt: Configure Laravel Pint for code styling
evals.expected_output: composer require laravel/pint --dev; run ./vendor/bin/pint; configure pint.json with preset: 'laravel'; add to CI pipeline; never use older Laravel Mix or manually format code

composer require laravel/horizon; php artisan horizon:install; configure supervisors in config/horizon.php per queue; run php artisan horizon; access /horizon in browser; set auth in HorizonServiceProvider

evals.prompt: Migrate from Laravel Mix to Vite
evals.expected_output: Remove laravel-mix; install vite + laravel-vite-plugin; update package.json scripts: build/dev; replace mix() with vite() in Blade; rename webpack.mix.js → vite.config.js; update npm run dev

evals.prompt: Bundle CSS and JS assets in Laravel
evals.expected_output: Use Vite (not Mix) with @vite directive; configure input files in vite.config.js laravel plugin; run npm run build for production; auto-generates cache-busted filenames; no manual versioning needed

should_not_trigger: Configure webpack in a Next.js project
Set up Gradle build in a Spring Boot project
npm scripts in a plain Node.js project
